zh.lifeSummary: 當Marcus de Whalesborough於1258年之前出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾布德時，他的父親William de Whalesborough11254歲，母親Mrs Margaret Whalesborough22歲。他於1270年與Matilda Arundell在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marcus de Whalesborough于1258年之前出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾布德时，他的父亲William de Whalesborough11254岁，母亲Mrs Margaret Whalesborough22岁。他于1270年与Matilda Arundell在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marcus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original Latin form of Mark , of unknown derivation; it may possibly be connected with Mars, the name of the Roman god of war, or the adjective mas ‘male, virile’ (genitive maris). This was one of the very small number of Roman given names of the classical period. There were only about a dozen of these in general use, with perhaps another dozen confined to particular families. Marcus has been in use in the English-speaking world since the 16th century if not earlier; in the 20th century it enjoyed a considerable increase in popularity. As an African-American name it is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Black Consciousness leader Marcus Garvey ( 1887–1940 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marcus de Whalesborough was born before 1258, in Bude, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Whalesborough, was 11254 and his mother, Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, was 22. He married Matilda Arundell in 1270, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1300, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marcus de Whalesborough est né avant 1258, à Bude, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Whalesborough, avait 11254 ans et sa mère, Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Arundell en 1270, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1300, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marcus de Whalesborough vor 1258 in Bude, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Whalesborough 11254 und seine Mutter Mrs Margaret Whalesborough 22. Er hat 1270 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England Matilda Arundell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1300 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marcus de Whalesborough è nato il prima del 1258 nel Bude, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Whalesborough, aveva 11254 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Arundell nel 1270, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Marcus de Whalesboroughが1258年以前にイギリスイギリスコルンワルブドで生まれた時，父William de Whalesboroughは11254歳，母Mrs Margaret Whalesboroughは22歳であった。1270年にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウでMatilda Arundellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marcus de Whalesborough(이)가 1258년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 부드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Whalesborough(은)는 11254세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Margaret Whalesborough(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1270년 영국 코른월 화알스버루에서 Matilda Arundell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marcus de Whalesborough nasceu antes 1258, em Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Whalesborough, tinha 11254 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Arundell em 1270, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1300, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marcus de Whalesborough родился перед 1258 г. в местности буд, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Whalesborough было 11254 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Arundell в 1270 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1300 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marcus de Whalesborough nació antes de 1258, en Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Whalesborough, tenía 11254 años y su mamá, Mrs Margaret Whalesborough, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Matilda Arundell en 1270, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1300, en su pueblo.
